payload.input_str:
{'sql': "SELECT DISTINCT s.Fname
FROM Student s
WHERE s.StuID IN (
    SELECT hp.StuID
    FROM Has_Pet hp
    JOIN Pets p ON hp.PetID = p.PetID
    WHERE LOWER(p.PetType) = 'cat'
)
AND s.StuID IN (
    SELECT hp.StuID
    FROM Has_Pet hp
    JOIN Pets p ON hp.PetID = p.PetID
    WHERE LOWER(p.PetType) = 'dog'
);"}

final.final_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.Fname
FROM Student s
WHERE s.StuID IN (
    SELECT hp.StuID
    FROM Has_Pet hp
    JOIN Pets p ON hp.PetID = p.PetID
    WHERE LOWER(p.PetType) = 'cat'
)
AND s.StuID IN (
    SELECT hp.StuID
    FROM Has_Pet hp
    JOIN Pets p ON hp.PetID = p.PetID
    WHERE LOWER(p.PetType) = 'dog'
);
final.answer_text: No students have both cats and dogs as pets in the database.
